title: tsc
html:
tsc

File Read

Context: sudo, unprivileged

tsc /path/to/input-file.ts

File Write

Context: sudo, unprivileged

tsc /path/to/input-file.ts --outFile /path/to/output-file
excerpt: tsc File Read Context: sudo, unprivileged tsc /path/to/input-file.ts File Write Context: sudo, unprivileged tsc /path/to/input-file.ts --outFile /path/to/output-file
